description: A logistics planner must create a schedule to redeploy 5,000 personnel from a theater of operations back to their home country.

nodes.task_description: Identify all personnel to be redeployed and their home bases.

expected_outcome.value: Planner has a complete list of personnel and their destinations.

nodes.task_description: Book the required number of strategic airlift flights to transport all personnel over a two-week period.

expected_outcome.value: Planner successfully reserves the necessary air transport.

nodes.task_description: Create a detailed manifest for each flight and coordinate ground transportation to and from the airports.

expected_outcome.value: Planner creates a complete, end-to-end travel plan for all personnel.
